name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a sequence of length N where each element is either 0 (free) or the index of the philosopher holding it *)
(* States: a sequence of length N where each element is one of {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 0 THEN N - 1 ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N - 1 THEN 0 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial condition: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Next action: a philosopher can pick up forks if hungry and both forks are free, or put down forks if eating *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 0..N-1 :
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 0..N-1 :
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ \E i \in 0..N-1 :
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant: forks is a sequence of length N with each element in 0..N-1 or 0; states is a sequence of length N with each element in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in Seq(0..N-1)
          /\ states \in Seq({"thinking")
          /\ Len(forks) = N
          /\ Len(states) = N
          /\ \A i \in 0..N-1 : forks[i] \in 0..N-1
          /\ \A i \in 0..N-1 : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
      /\ flag = <<[x \in 1..N |-> FALSE]>>


Next == /\ num' = num + 1
      /\ flag' = <<[x \in 1..N |-> FALSE]>>


Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K. *)
(* head points to the next element to be dequeued. *)
(* tail points to the next position to be enqueued. *)
(* count is the number of elements in the queue. *)

(* Helper functions *)
IsFull == count = K
IsEmpty == count = 0

(* The queue is a sequence of length K, initialized to the empty sequence. *)
Init == /\ q = <<>>
       /\ head = 1
       /\ tail = 1
       /\ count = 0

(* The producer enqueues an element x when the queue is not full. *)
Enqueue(x) == /\ NOT IsFull
              /\ q' = Append(q, x)
              /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
              /\ count' = count + 1
              /\ head' = head

(* The consumer dequeues an element when the queue is not empty. *)
Dequeue == /\ NOT IsEmpty
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = q

(* The next-state relation allows either enqueue or dequeue. *)
Next == Enqueue(x) \/ Dequeue

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>> /\ TypeOK

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ====

name: Token Ring

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy
       /\ chosenByVal' = chosenByVal

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen, chosenBy, chosenByVal>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ \A i \in 1..N : known[i] = <<>> /\ infected[i] = <<>> /\ \A j \in 1..N : j \in 1..N

Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N : known[i] = known[i] \/ infected[i]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : infected[i] = <<>> /\ \A j \in 1..N : j \in 1..N

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c = client
                                            THEN allocated[c] \cup {p}

          /\ client \in Clients
          /\ p \in free
        \/ /\ free' = free
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c = client
                                            THEN allocated[c] \ {p}

          /\ client \in Clients
          /\ p \in allocated[client]
          /\ allocated[client] # {}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in free
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 # c2
          /\ allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId

Init == /\ subscribers = <<>>
        /\ messages = <<>>
        /\ nextMsgId = 0
        /\ nextSubId = 0

Next == /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextMsgId>>
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [id |-> nextMsgId, content |-> "New Message"])
        /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
        /\ nextSubId' = nextSubId

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1 - turn] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
